name: Billy the Kid
description:
A cute and careless android.

He is an avid fan of the TV series "Star Knights". Not only does he call himself a Star Knight, but he also often quotes lines from the films from memory.

He calls his custom-made large-caliber revolvers "babies". Apparently, they were a gift from an old friend.

He may look irresponsible, but once he gets down to business, he can handle any challenge.
